fields.acceptance_criteria: Append-only NDJSON per-session event log + periodic checkpoints; killed process resumes a loop from last checkpoint; client disconnect+reconnect restores authoritative state with no lost/duplicated events; watchdog pauses stuck/over-budget loops with an audit reason; per-session/tool correlation ids in tracing.
fields.title: [agent-harness][CH10] Reliability/recovery: checkpointing + reconnect semantics
fields.validation_plan: Fast: cargo check -p agent-server -p agent-core. Primary: cargo test (checkpoint resume, reconnect continuity, watchdog trip). Manual: reconnect validated in CH11 browser e2e. Failure logs: target/test-logs/.
